message:
refactor(pthread): remove mutexattr host delegation fallbacks

Simplify mutexattr get/set functions by returning EINVAL when internal
word is invalid instead of delegating to host functions. Removes 4
unused host resolution functions for mutexattr gettype/getprotocol/
getpshared/getrobust.

Also adds comprehensive pthread_abi integration tests covering mutex
types, condvars, rwlocks, thread lifecycle, TSD, once, spinlocks,
barriers, attributes, cancel state, and thread naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
